 {"id":"gt-f9x.3","title":"gt install command: Create workspace structure","description":"Create Gas Town workspace structure.

## Command

```
gt install [path]
```

If path omitted, uses current directory.

## Created Structure

```
<path>/
├── config/
│   ├── town.json      # {"type": "town", "version": 1, ...}
│   └── rigs.json      # {"version": 1, "rigs": {}}
│
└── mayor/
    ├── CLAUDE.md      # Mayor role prompting (from template)
    ├── mail/
    │   └── inbox.jsonl  # Empty inbox
    └── state.json     # Initial mayor state
```

## Implementation

```go
func Install(path string, opts InstallOptions) error

type InstallOptions struct {
    TownName string  // defaults to directory name
    Force    bool    // overwrite existing
}
```

## Steps

1. Validate path (exists, writable)
2. Check not already a town (unless --force)
3. Create config/ directory
4. Write town.json with name and timestamp
5. Write empty rigs.json
6. Create mayor/ directory structure
7. Write CLAUDE.md from template
8. Create empty inbox.jsonl
9. Write initial state.json

## Error Cases

- Path does not exist: Create it (like mkdir -p)
- Already a town: Error unless --force
- Permission denied: Clear error message
- Inside existing town: Warn (nested towns not recommended)

## Templates

Mayor CLAUDE.md comes from embedded template (see gt-u1j.20).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:36:53.455589-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T17:20:04.66874-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-17T17:20:04.66874-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.3","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:36:53.455924-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.3","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:32.513796-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.3","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:32.597456-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-f9x.4","title":"Doctor framework: Check interface, Result types, Report","description":"Framework for gt doctor health checks.

## Check Interface

```go
type Check interface {
    Name() string
    Description() string
    Run(ctx *CheckContext) *CheckResult
    Fix(ctx *CheckContext) error  // optional auto-fix
    CanFix() bool
}

type CheckContext struct {
    TownRoot string
    RigName  string  // empty for town-level checks
    Verbose  bool
}

type CheckResult struct {
    Status  CheckStatus
    Message string
    Details []string  // additional info
    FixHint string    // suggestion if not auto-fixable
}

type CheckStatus int
const (
    StatusOK CheckStatus = iota
    StatusWarning
    StatusError
)
```

## Report

```go
type Report struct {
    Timestamp time.Time
    Checks    []CheckResult
    Summary   ReportSummary
}

type ReportSummary struct {
    Total    int
    OK       int
    Warnings int
    Errors   int
}

func (r *Report) Print(w io.Writer, verbose bool)
```

## Doctor Runner

```go
type Doctor struct {
    checks []Check
}

func NewDoctor() *Doctor
func (d *Doctor) Register(check Check)
func (d *Doctor) Run(ctx *CheckContext) *Report
func (d *Doctor) Fix(ctx *CheckContext) *Report  // run with auto-fix
```

## Built-in Checks

Town-level (gt-f9x.5):
- ConfigExists, ConfigValid
- StateExists, StateValid
- MayorMailboxExists
- RigsRegistryValid

Rig-level (gt-f9x.6):
- RigCloneExists
- GitExcludeConfigured
- WitnessExists, RefineryExists
- PolecatClonesValid","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:03.81542-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T16:14:33.83426-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-17T15:48:19.92644-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.4","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:03.815763-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-f9x.5","title":"Workspace doctor checks: Config, state, mail, Mayor, rigs","description":"Workspace-level doctor checks.

## Checks

### ConfigExists
- Verify config/ directory exists
- Verify config/town.json exists
- Fix: Cannot auto-fix (need gt install)

### ConfigValid
- Parse town.json
- Verify required fields (type, version, name)
- Verify type == "town"
- Fix: Cannot auto-fix

### RigsRegistryValid
- Parse config/rigs.json
- Verify each registered rig directory exists
- Warn on missing rigs
- Fix: Remove missing rigs from registry

### MayorExists
- Verify mayor/ directory exists
- Verify mayor/CLAUDE.md exists
- Fix: Create from template

### MayorMailboxExists
- Verify mayor/mail/ directory exists
- Verify mayor/mail/inbox.jsonl exists (can be empty)
- Fix: Create directory and empty file

### MayorStateValid
- Parse mayor/state.json if exists
- Verify valid JSON
- Fix: Reset to default state

## Implementation

```go
var WorkspaceChecks = []Check{
    &ConfigExistsCheck{},
    &ConfigValidCheck{},
    &RigsRegistryValidCheck{},
    &MayorExistsCheck{},
    &MayorMailboxExistsCheck{},
    &MayorStateValidCheck{},
}
```","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"gastown/cheedo","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:05.267701-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T13:37:03.239916-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.5","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:05.268035-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.5","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:34.289236-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.5","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:34.380374-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"gt-f9x.6","title":"Rig doctor checks: Refinery health, clones, gitignore","description":"Rig-level doctor checks.

## Checks

### RigIsGitRepo
- Verify .git/ directory exists
- Verify git status works
- Fix: Cannot auto-fix

### GitExcludeConfigured
- Check .git/info/exclude contains Gas Town dirs
- Required entries: polecats/ witness/ refinery/ mayor/
- Fix: Append missing entries

### WitnessExists
- Verify witness/ directory exists
- Verify witness/rig/ is a git clone
- Verify witness/mail/inbox.jsonl exists
- Fix: Create structure, clone repo

### RefineryExists
- Verify refinery/ directory exists
- Verify refinery/rig/ is a git clone
- Verify refinery/mail/inbox.jsonl exists
- Fix: Create structure, clone repo

### MayorCloneExists
- Verify mayor/ directory exists
- Verify mayor/rig/ is a git clone
- Fix: Create structure, clone repo

### PolecatClonesValid
- For each polecat in polecats/:
  - Verify is a git clone
  - Verify on polecat branch
  - Warn if has uncommitted changes
- Fix: Cannot auto-fix (data loss risk)

### BeadsConfigValid (if applicable)
- If .beads/ exists, verify bd commands work
- Check beads sync status
- Warn if out of sync
- Fix: Run bd sync

## Implementation

```go
var RigChecks = []Check{
    &RigIsGitRepoCheck{},
    &GitExcludeConfiguredCheck{},
    &WitnessExistsCheck{},
    &RefineryExistsCheck{},
    &MayorCloneExistsCheck{},
    &PolecatClonesValidCheck{},
    &BeadsConfigValidCheck{},
}

 {"id":"gt-f9x.7","title":"Connection interface: Protocol for local/remote ops","description":"Abstract interface for local vs remote (SSH) operations.

## Concept

Enable Gas Town to manage rigs on remote machines via SSH. The Connection interface abstracts whether operations happen locally or remotely.

## Interface

```go
type Connection interface {
    // Identification
    Name() string
    IsLocal() bool

    // File operations
    ReadFile(path string) ([]byte, error)
    WriteFile(path string, data []byte, perm os.FileMode) error
    MkdirAll(path string, perm os.FileMode) error
    Remove(path string) error
    Stat(path string) (os.FileInfo, error)
    Glob(pattern string) ([]string, error)

    // Command execution
    Exec(cmd string, args ...string) ([]byte, error)
    ExecDir(dir, cmd string, args ...string) ([]byte, error)

    // Tmux (for session management)
    TmuxNewSession(name, dir string) error
    TmuxKillSession(name string) error
    TmuxSendKeys(session, keys string) error
    TmuxCapturePane(session string, lines int) (string, error)
}
```

## Implementations

- LocalConnection (gt-f9x.8): Direct file/exec operations
- SSHConnection (future): Operations via SSH

## Usage

```go
func NewRigManager(conn Connection, ...) *RigManager

// Operations work the same regardless of connection type
rm.DiscoverRigs()  // uses conn.Glob, conn.ReadFile
```

## Design Notes

- Connection obtained from MachineRegistry (gt-f9x.9)
- Default is always local
- SSH connection requires machine config (host, key, user)","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:07.764838-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T23:17:18.465919-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.7","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:07.765169-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-f9x.8","title":"LocalConnection: Local file/exec/tmux operations","description":"LocalConnection implementation for local machine operations.

## Implementation

```go
type LocalConnection struct {
    tmux *Tmux
}

func NewLocalConnection() *LocalConnection

func (c *LocalConnection) Name() string { return "local" }
func (c *LocalConnection) IsLocal() bool { return true }
```

## File Operations

Direct passthrough to os package:
```go
func (c *LocalConnection) ReadFile(path string) ([]byte, error) {
    return os.ReadFile(path)
}
// etc.
```

## Command Execution

Uses exec.Command:
```go
func (c *LocalConnection) Exec(cmd string, args ...string) ([]byte, error) {
    return exec.Command(cmd, args...).Output()
}
```

## Tmux

Delegates to Tmux wrapper:
```go
func (c *LocalConnection) TmuxNewSession(name, dir string) error {
    return c.tmux.NewSession(name, dir)
}
```

## Notes

Straightforward implementation - this is the "baseline" connection that SSHConnection will mirror remotely.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:19.879102-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T23:17:18.556669-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.8","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:19.879451-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.8","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:36.087392-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-f9x.9","title":"Machine registry: Store and manage machine configs","description":"Registry for managing remote machines in federation.

## Data Model

```go
type Machine struct {
    Name     string `json:"name"`
    Type     string `json:"type"`      // "local", "ssh", "gcp"
    Host     string `json:"host"`      // for ssh: user@host
    KeyPath  string `json:"key_path"`  // SSH key path
    TownPath string `json:"town_path"` // Path to town on remote
}
```

## Interface

```go
type MachineRegistry struct {
    path     string  // config/federation.json
    machines map[string]*Machine
}

func NewMachineRegistry(configPath string) *MachineRegistry
func (r *MachineRegistry) Get(name string) (*Machine, error)
func (r *MachineRegistry) Add(m *Machine) error
func (r *MachineRegistry) Remove(name string) error
func (r *MachineRegistry) List() []*Machine
func (r *MachineRegistry) Connection(name string) (Connection, error)
```

## Storage

federation.json in config/:
```json
{
  "version": 1,
  "machines": {
    "local": {"type": "local"},
    "gcp-vm-1": {
      "type": "ssh",
      "host": "user@10.0.0.1",
      "key_path": "~/.ssh/gcp_key",
      "town_path": "/home/user/ai"
    }
  }
}
```

## Connection Factory

```go
func (r *MachineRegistry) Connection(name string) (Connection, error) {
    m := r.machines[name]
    switch m.Type {
    case "local":
        return NewLocalConnection(), nil
    case "ssh":
        return NewSSHConnection(m.Host, m.KeyPath), nil
    }
}
```","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:21.968099-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T23:17:18.644857-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.9","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:21.968442-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-f9x.9","depends_on_id":"gt-f9x.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-15T16:37:36.174052-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
